POS OF OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE; DECLARATION OF MILOSLAV KHADILKAR FILED BY DEFENDANT A & D CONSTRUCTION, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT ALFRED WONG'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-517449 WITH CASE CGC-11-512046 IS GRANTED. 2329-2331-2333 PACIFIC HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION V. A & D CONSTRUCTION, INC. (CGC-11-512046) AND BRILL V. WONG (CGC-12-517449) ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES. CGC-11-512046 IS DESIGNATED THE LEAD CASE AND ALL FUTURE FILINGS MUST BE IN THAT CASE ONLY. THE TWO ACTIONS INVOLVE COMMON QUESTIONS OF LAW AND FACT. CONSOLIDATION WILL PROMOTE JUDICIAL ECONOMY AND NOT ADVERSELY AFFECT THE RIGHTS OF ANY PARTY. 2329-2331-2333 PACIFIC HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION'S CURRENT PRO PER STATUS DOES NOT WARRANT DENIAL OF THE MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: NO ARGUMENT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT ALFRED WONG'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASES CGC-11-512046 AND CGC-12-517449 IS OFF CALENDAR. DUPLICATE ENTRY. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar May-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Andrea Reyna Murphy, Esq. of Phillips Spallas & Angstadt, Tel. 415.278.9400, for defendant and moving party;
Miloslav Khadlikar, Esq. of Van De Poel, Levy & Allen, Tel. 925.934.6102, for defendant A&D Construction Inc. by Court Call.

RULING: The matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT ALFRED WONG's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Cross-Complaint is granted. It is in the interests of justice to have the entire matter resolved in one action. There is little prejudice in allowing amendment since the proposed cross-defendants are already parties to the action. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Susan Crozier, CSR # 4761

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-517449 WITH CASE CGC-11-512046
Off Calendar Oct-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: BRIAN SORIANO, ESQ., LAW OFFICES OF BRIAN SORIANO, 415.615.0881, FOR PLAINTIFF JON BRILL (CASE 517449).
MILOSLAV KHADILKAR, ESQ., VAN DE POEL, LEVY & ALLEN, 925.934.6102 X259, FOR DEFENDANT A&D CONSTRUCTION INC. (CASE 512046).
ANDREA MURPHY, ESQ., PHILLIPS SPALLAS & ANGSTADT, 415.278.9400, FOR DEFENDANT ALFRED WONG.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT ALFRED WONG'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-12-517449 WITH CASE CGC-11-512046 is granted. 2329-2331-2333 Pacific Homeowners Association v. A & D Construction, Inc. (CGC-11-512046) and Brill v. Wong (CGC-12-517449) are consolidated for all purposes. CGC-11-512046 is designated the lead case and all future filings must be in that case only. The two actions involve common questions of law and fact. Consolidation will promote judicial economy and not adversely affect the rights of any party. 2329-2331-2333 Pacific Homeowners Association's current pro per status does not warrant denial of the motion. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

ANDREA MURPHY, ESQ., PHILLIPS SPALLAS & ANGSTADT, 415.278.9400, FOR DEFENDANT ALFRED WONG.
